title: Regulatory Reporting
objective: Meet all regulatory breach-reporting requirements in time and content.

title: Law Enforcement Partners
objective: Engage relevant authorities promptly when criminal or nation-state activity is suspected.

title: Information-Sharing Communities
objective: Share sanitized threat intelligence with industry peers and ISACs to strengthen collective defense.

title: Privacy Notification Requirements
objective: Notify affected individuals per legal and contractual obligations following a verified data breach.

title: Personnel
objective: Inform affected teams during incidents; distribute internal guidance and FAQs to prevent misinformation and streamline remediation.

title: Top Management
objective: Provide executive briefings summarizing incident status, impact, response options, and decisions.

title: Incident Response Team
objective: Maintain synchronized internal communication during active incidents with a single source of truth.

title: Public Updates / Disclosures
objective: Manage public and media communications through approved statements that balance transparency and risk.

title: Recovery Activity & Restoration
objective: Provide partners and customers timely updates about service restoration and remediation status.

title: Containment
objective: Limit the spread and impact of an incident by isolating affected assets, blocking malicious activity, and preserving evidence for investigation.

title: Eradication
objective: Completely remove malicious artifacts, vulnerabilities, or misconfigurations that caused the incident.

title: Disaster Recovery
objective: Recover systems and data from a clean, trusted state post-incident using verified, immutable backups.

title: Business Continuity
objective: Maintain critical operations during incident response and recovery, ensuring customer commitments and mission continuity.

title: Incident Response: AI
objective: Ensure timely and coordinated response to AI-related incidents such as harmful or biased outputs, data leakage, model poisoning, or unauthorized model behavior to protect users, data integrity, and compliance obligations.

title: Incident Response: Cybersecurity
objective: Coordinate technical response to cybersecurity incidents across infrastructure, endpoints, networks, applications, and third-party systems to limit impact and restore operations.

title: Incident Response: Privacy
objective: Manage and mitigate personal data breaches or unauthorized processing activities, ensuring compliance with privacy laws and customer trust.

title: Incident Lessons Learned
objective: Ensure every incident or near miss results in measurable learning, control enhancement, and organizational improvement.
